quotes:
The three approved brand colors in hierarchy order are: (1) 
#00529B Deep Blue (dominant), (2) 
#FAA31B Amber Orange (secondary accent), (3) 
#FFC60A Golden Yellow (tertiary accent).

The three approved brand colors in hierarchy order are: (1) 
#00529B Deep Blue (dominant), (2) 
#FAA31B Amber Orange (secondary accent), (3) 
#FFC60A Golden Yellow (tertiary accent).

rules.intent: Maintain the established brand color weight and hierarchy across applications.
rules.rule_text: The approved brand colors must follow a strict hierarchical order of application: (1) Brand Blue (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529b) as dominant, (2) Sunshine / Amber Orange (color.primary.sunshine = #faa31b) as the secondary accent, and (3) Gold / Golden Yellow (color.primary.gold = #ffc60a) as the tertiary accent.

quotes:
Agenda, is the primary headline font
and should be used for all headlines and headers.

Agenda, is the primary headline font
and should be used for all headlines and headers.

rules.intent: Ensure typographic consistency for high-level information architecture.
rules.rule_text: Agenda (font.family.agenda = Agenda) is the primary headline font and must be used for all headlines and headers.

quotes:
Nunito Sans should be used for
all body copy in print.

Nunito Sans should be used for
all body copy in print.

rules.intent: Establish clean, readable body typography in offline/print collateral.
rules.rule_text: Nunito Sans (font.family.nunito_sans = Nunito Sans) should be used for all body copy in print materials.

quotes: use this shape and treatment for CTAs:
use this shape and treatment for CTAs:

rules.intent: Unify the interactive call-to-action geometry and color treatment across banner creatives.
rules.rule_text: CTAs in banner applications must employ the approved vector shape featuring an asymmetric pill-to-sharp corner radius (gradient_banner.button.radius = 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px) and a linear gradient fill transition starting at SVG Yellow (color.cta.svg_yellow = #FFDF55) and ending at SVG Orange (color.cta.svg_orange = #FAA21B).
